e author of the accessor is specified either in the setup () function or in XML as in the following examples: exports.setup = function() { accessor.author('Edward A. Lee'); } or in XML, <author>Edward A. Lee</author> There is no constraint on t

Edward A. Lee</author> There is no constraint on the text identifying the author. Single and multiple authors are acceptable, as are institutional authors, and an email address may be included. Back to accessor specification Edit - History - Print -
